notes: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, 8,000+ packs (Aug 2021): normal V 10.56%, normal VMAX 5.60%, full art 2.78%, alt-art V 1.10%, alt-art VMAX 0.30%, rainbow rare 0.84%, gold rare 0.91% per pack (hit rate 22.10%). Full arts and in-set alt-art V merged into ultra-rare; secret-numbered alt-art VMAX merged with rainbow rares (same per-card odds ~0.05%, labeled Rare Rainbow by card databases). Holo-rare share (22%) from a smaller 630-pack community sample (DigitalTQ via RipOrFlip); residual mass on non-holo rare. Reverse filler approximated 50/50 common/uncommon. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. SWSH ETB contains 8 packs.
